sentences.arabic: اجْتَمَعَ وُزَرَاءُ الخَارِجِيَّةِ اليَوْمَ لِمُنَاقَشَةِ السَّلَامِ فِي المِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ministri vanjskih poslova sastali su se danas kako bi razgovarali o miru u regiji.
sentences.translationEn: Foreign ministers met today to discuss peace in the region.

sentences.arabic: اتَّفَقَ القَادَةُ عَلَى ضَرُورَةِ التَّعَاوُنِ بَيْنَ الدُّوَلِ.
sentences.translation: Lideri su se složili o neophodnosti saradnje između država.
sentences.translationEn: Leaders agreed on the necessity of cooperation between countries.

sentences.arabic: تَحَدَّثَ المُشَارِكُونَ عَنْ طُرُقِ حَلِّ الخِلَافَاتِ بِالطُّرُقِ السِّلْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Učesnici su razgovarali o načinima rješavanja sporova mirnim putem.
sentences.translationEn: Participants spoke about ways to resolve disputes through peaceful means.

sentences.arabic: رَحَّبَ النَّاسُ بِهَذِهِ الخُطْوَةِ الإِيجَابِيَّةِ نَحْوَ الِاسْتِقْرَارِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su pozdravili ovaj pozitivan korak ka stabilnosti.
sentences.translationEn: People welcomed this positive step towards stability.

sentences.arabic: سَيُعْقَدُ اجْتِمَاعٌ آخَرُ فِي الشَّهْرِ القَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Drugi sastanak će se održati sljedećeg mjeseca.
sentences.translationEn: Another meeting will be held next month.
